fixture.notes: The indexer entry point — search must always surface the IndexingPipeline class first when queried by name. A regression here means the symbol ranker stopped honouring exact name matches.
The ask pipeline composes prompt context via gatherContext(). Both the function and its file should be reachable from a search by name.
Anything that writes to decisions.db goes through DecisionStore. A search by class name must surface the class itself in the top results.
packContext is the engine behind gatherContext — it must be discoverable by name.

When a user asks about gatherContext, gatherContext / packContext should pull src/ai/ask-shared.ts into the LLM context envelope. This proves the feature-scope file selector still wires FTS file matches into the envelope.
A user question about the indexer pipeline must result in src/indexer/pipeline.ts being included in the packed context. Regression here = packContext lost its identifier-driven file ranking.

decisions_seed.title: WAL checkpoint policy
decisions_seed.content: Run wal_checkpoint TRUNCATE on a 30-second timer to keep the journal bounded under heavy read traffic with sparse writes.

decisions_seed.title: Bound WAL growth
decisions_seed.content: journal_size_limit is set to 100 MiB so a stalled checkpoint can never balloon disk use without bound.

decisions_seed.title: Use neverthrow Result envelope
decisions_seed.content: Return ok/err Result everywhere instead of throwing — improves call-site control flow and machine-parsability for the MCP transport.

decisions_seed.title: Plugin registry default set
decisions_seed.content: PluginRegistry.createWithDefaults wires every shipped language and framework plugin so callers do not have to enumerate them manually.

fixture.notes: Verifies query_decisions FTS5 search still ranks decisions matching the query above unrelated decisions, even when the corpus contains noise.
